details.reasoning: The implementation successfully adds json_path constraint support to SGLang. Strengths: (1) New constraint function jsonpath_to_json_schema() properly converts JSONPath expressions to JSON Schema for constrained generation; (2) Properly registered in grammar_manager.py alongside existing constraints with appropriate conversion logic; (3) json_path parameter added throughout IR layer (lang/ir.py), API layer (lang/api.py), sampling params (sampling_params.py), and interpreter; (4) Mutual exclusivity enforced with regex/json_schema/ebnf; (5) Comprehensive test coverage including parsing, error handling, schema building, and end-to-end integration tests; (6) Follows existing SGLang patterns consistently. Minor deduction: Implementation uses a conversion function approach rather than a dedicated constraint class, and validation happens through schema-based generation constraints rather than explicit output validation, though these are valid approaches consistent with the codebase's existing patterns.
